title: 年忘れディナーショー

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Raise the curtains for a glamorous dinner and
opera show hosted by and starring none other
than... me! But could this be a twist of fate?

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Scheduled at the same exact time, the so-called
Golden Generation are holding an event of their
own.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: I concede the achievements to their names... However! I am the true star!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Observe—I shall captivate the hearts and minds
of the crowd as only the lead role can! So
inspired, a grand feast with my followers ensues.
